title: Day 3 of Sabarimala reference hearing: Live updates from Supreme Court
description: Justice Bagchi: Article 26 is not a citizen.ASG Nataraj: Collectively.Justice Bagchi: Collectively an organisation. Article 25 is of individuals. Without individuals there can be no Article 26. Article 25 is a larger issue. For practical purposes Article 26 is of a narrow spectrum management.These are the words that have been carefully constructed. Just like the concept of an association or a trade union to represent the collective group.Justice Bagchi: What you are saying is Article 26(1)(b) is
